comment.body: how do we feel about PCE tomorrow?
comment.raw_body: how do we feel about PCE tomorrow?

user.name: Jolene
user.bio: e-girl

comment.body:
I posted last week in chat that there are very few things that will put fear into the heart of this market and Nvidia was supposed to be one. Market even brushed off that one. I do not think PCE will scare them. In fact everyone and their grandma on street now knows Bessent is doing shadow QRE via treasury purchases etc. They know this admin is super supportive of stocks and inflation will skyrocket. However that pain of inflation is for consumers and not for companies since they will pass on the hikes and reap the benefit of higher profits as long as demand sustains. 

Short answer the bubble can be inflated much further and I do not think street cares about PCE tomorrow. More of the same and upward painful grind just like today.
